title: SV: IVL_UVM - virtual task call leads to crash

features.name: package_with_class_virtual_task
features.description: Code should include a package that defines a class with a virtual task declaration

features.name: module_import_from_package
features.description: Code should include a module that imports symbols from a package using import pkg::*

features.name: class_instantiation_and_virtual_task_call
features.description: Code should include a class instantiation followed by a virtual task method call on the object instance within an initial block
